data.title: Got Electric LLC ranked #1 in Maryland, D.C., Delaware, and West Virginia among electrical subcontractors by Solar Power World.
data.description: A company based in Ijamsville, Maryland, known as Got Electric LLC has achieved the top ranking in Maryland, Washington D.C., Delaware, and West Virginia among electrical subcontractors. The achievement was confirmed on August 8, 2025. This reputable company has been acknowledged by Solar Power World for an impressive 13 years in a row, solidifying its position as one of the leading solar contractors in the nation.

data.title: Bybit launches new Web3 platform, offering $200,000 in prizes, solidifying position as world's 2nd largest crypto exchange.
data.description: In Dubai, UAE on August 8, 2025, Bybit, the world's second-largest cryptocurrency exchange in terms of trading volume, has revealed a new development in Web3 infrastructure called Bybit Web3. Following a pause in operations in May for restructuring, the announcement signifies Bybit's continued presence and innovation in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Accel-KKR raises $1.9B fund, commits $350M to isolved's growth for organic initiatives and acquisitions.
data.description: A global technology-focused investment firm, Accel-KKR, has revealed the finalization of AKKR, which involves a commitment of $350 million in fresh capital to expedite isolved's advancement through organic initiatives and beneficial acquisitions. This fund aims to propel isolved's growth significantly. This announcement was made in Menlo Park, Calif., on August 8, 2025.

data.title: Life Time transforms former Concourse Athletic Club into Life Time Perimeter, 9th Atlanta-area club, with multi-million dollar renovation.
data.description: A major renovation project costing millions of dollars has been completed, offering a comprehensive health and wellness experience to both working professionals and families at a landmark location in Atlanta. As of August 8, 2025, Life Time (NYSE: LTH), a leading healthy lifestyle brand in the country, has expanded its footprint in the...

data.title: VerifyMe (NASDAQ: VRME) to report Q1 2025 financial results on August 13, 2025. Company provides brand protection & logistics solutions.
data.description: VerifyMe, Inc., a company based in Lake Mary, Florida, and traded on the NASDAQ under the symbol VRME, has revealed its latest offerings for brand owners. These include services focused on time and temperature sensitive logistics, as well as solutions for brand protection and enhancement. The company shared this information in a recent announcement and plans to disclose its financial results soon.

data.title: Jennmar acquires Weber Mining & Tunnelling SAS to bolster international presence in mining and tunneling.
data.description: Pittsburgh-based company Jennmar recently announced a new transaction on August 8, 2025, which aims to enhance and supplement their mining and tunneling customer solutions. This development involves a collaboration with Weber, known for their strong track record in research and development. Weber brings to the table a top-notch portfolio of resin and foam products designed for critical applications. The specific financial details of the transaction were not disclosed in the announcement, but it is expected to significantly boost Jennmar's offerings in the sector.

data.title: Brown Plus promotes Courtney Catlin, CPA, to Learning and Development Manager role on Aug 1, 2025 in Frederick, Md.
data.description: A prominent accounting and advisory firm based in Frederick, Md., Brown Plus, has recently promoted Courtney Catlin, CPA, to the position of Learning and Development Manager, starting from August 1, 2025. This role, which has been newly created within the organization, marks an exciting development for the firm.

data.title: Dow Jones futures up, Trade Desk down 30% on earnings, Pinterest & Twilio also fall, live updates.
data.description: Today in the stock market, Dow Jones futures experienced an increase, signaling positive market movement. However, Trade Desk faced a significant decline of 30% following their earnings report. Additionally, both Pinterest and Twilio also suffered losses. The overall market trend appears to be mixed with specific companies facing challenges. These developments highlight the volatility and unpredictability of the current market conditions.

data.title: Dow Jones futures up with big earnings; Tesla stops Dojo; AppLovin, Robinhood signal buys despite market dip.
data.description: Stock futures experienced an increase fueled by strong earnings reports, with Tesla discontinuing its Dojo supercomputer project. On Thursday, AppLovin and Robinhood showed positive buy signals despite a market downturn. This development resulted in Dow Jones futures rising. These numbers indicate a promising outlook for investors.

data.title: Trump's executive order allowing 401(k)s into crypto is expected to boost Bitcoin's gains amid mixed industry reactions.
data.description: The decision by President Trump to issue an executive order allowing 401(k) accounts to invest in cryptocurrency has sparked a range of reactions. Industry experts and skeptics have expressed a combination of support, concerns, and disapproval regarding this move.

data.title: Trump's $9 trillion executive order enables adding Bitcoin to retirement plans. US 401(k)s may soon include crypto. Wall Street is preparing.
data.description: A decision made by Trump has the potential to impact retirement plans in the US significantly. Bitcoin might soon become a viable asset within 401(k) plans, and the finance industry in Wall Street is actively preparing for this change.

data.title: Gauzy Ltd announces Alejandro Weinstein elected to board, a long-time investor and shareholder since 2016.
data.description: Gauzy is excited to share that Alejandro Weinstein, a former director, has been elected to the board. Alejandro has been an investor and shareholder with the company since 2016.
